modules.sql: WITH branch_data AS (SELECT b.branch_id, b.branch_name, b.address_line1, b.city, b.state_province, b.postal_code, b.country, b.ifw_effective_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.branch_id ORDER BY b.branch_id) AS rn FROM branches b) SELECT branch_id, branch_name, address_line1, city, state_province, postal_code, country, ifw_effective_date FROM branch_data WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY branch_id
